Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_BATTLE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Деякі учасники перебувають у бою. Ти хочеш продовжити без них?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_MEMBER_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I see. Then we'll continue on and rendezvous with them later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_BATTLE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Деякі члени нашої команди досі борються. Ти будеш продовжувати без них?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_MEMBER_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}All right. Well then, let's keep going![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We'll meet up with them later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_NPC_INF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4101 0 0}There seems to be a person on this floor. Will you leave without them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_NPC_INF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}Someone is still on this floor! Are you sure you want to move on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_Shift01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Wait. There could be more powerful enemies waiting ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Go ahead with the others. And be sure to keep at least one other person with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy01_M
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4098 0 0}Something feels different about the next floor![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I sense something more powerful... Like a tangible force of will. Stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy01_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}I sense something really strong directly below you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}You could be in for a fight as soon as you head down. Are you ready?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy02_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}I'm picking up a strong reading directly below![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy03_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}It looks like the enemy is holed up below.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy04_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}The final dead end should be below you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TUTO_FLOOR152_INFO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The story will develop significantly beyond this point. It is recommended to save your game first at the Desert of Doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FLOOR08_NG_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}There's something about the door on that floor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Aigis, could I ask you to investigate that door?[n]{f 1 1}
